events.event_description: Ronald Spogli presented credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to San Marino, establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations. Spogli was based in Rome.

evidence.quote: Ronald Spogli, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 2006-11-22. Credentials presented: 2007-03-08. Left post on 2009-02-06.
